description.value: One of your tails or tendrils functions like an extra hand and is capable of performing some precision tasks. You can hold one extra hand's worth of equipment with your prehensile limb, and you can use your prehensile limb to perform Interact actions. Your prehensile limb can be paired with another hand when you designate your active hands with the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Switch Hands] action, and you can wield a shield or weapon in your prehensile limb when it's one of your active hands.
